channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Tanzania, Kenya na Uganda wapangie mpango wa AFCON 2027
item.description: Serikali za Tanzania, Kenya na Uganda zimeamua kulifunua mpango wake wa kuwawezesha kuchukua jukumu kamili kama vivombo kama wale vuwani kwa mpira wa kikapu wa Afrika (AFCON 2027). Wizara wa michezo w...

item.title: Snap reduces workforce and job openings amid AI-driven restructuring
item.description: Snap Inc., the parent company of Snapchat, announced on April 15, 2026, that it will lay off around 1,000 employees, equivalent to about 16% of its full-time workforce. The company also plans to close...

item.title: Dartmouth Crossing evolves into a fully integrated residential and commercial community
item.description: Over two decades ago, developers of Dartmouth Crossing in Nova Scotia set out to transform a 511-acre property containing three old quarries into a vibrant mixed-use community. Much of that transforma...

item.title: Top 10 Restricted Places on Earth and Why Access is Forbidden
item.description: Plenty places for this world dey wey humans no suppose waka enter at all because e fit danger them, or na matter of science or tradition dey involved. North Sentinel Island for India na one example, b...

item.title: Imperial Oil Pipeline Spill of 843,000 Litres Near Cold Lake Under Investigation
item.description: An Imperial Oil pipeline spilled approximately 843,000 litres of bitumen emulsion northwest of Cold Lake, Alberta, on April 9, 2026. Imperial Oil confirmed that the spill has been stopped and containe...

item.title: Atiku Say Him Go Support Peter Obi If Obi Win ADC Presidential Ticket
item.description: Former Nigeria Vice President, Atiku Abubakar, don talk say him go step aside if Peter Obi, him fellow presidential aspirant for African Democratic Congress (ADC), win the party presidential ticket fo...

item.title: Warriors defeat Clippers in NBA play-in, advance to sudden-death game against Suns
item.description: In an intense Western Conference play-in game, the Golden State Warriors, ranked 10th, overcame the 9th-ranked Los Angeles Clippers with a 126-121 victory in Inglewood, California. Al Horford was the ...

item.title: Masked intruder caught prowling rooftops in South Philadelphia neighbourhood
item.description: A woman from South Philadelphia set up a night camera hoping to capture raccoons that were damaging her rooftop deck, but instead discovered footage of a masked man prowling across connected rowhouse ...

item.title: US ends temporary sanctions waiver for India’s import of Russian oil amid global tensions
item.description: The United States government confirmed that it will not extend the sanctions waivers that earlier allowed countries, including India, to import crude oil from Iran and Russia without facing penalties....

item.title: Kenya Airports Authority Appoints Moses Wekesa as CEO to Lead JKIA Modernisation
item.description: The Kenya Airports Authority (KAA) has finally filled the Chief Executive Officer position by appointing Moses Wekesa, who previously served as KenGen's Business Development Director. The leadership p...

item.title: Ofentse Pitse blends classical and contemporary music with Young Stunna in upcoming concert
item.description: Conductor Ofentse Pitse is set to bring her innovative concert series back to Cape Town with the second episode featuring amapiano sensation Young Stunna. Building on the success of her previous colla...

item.title: Ondo Ex-Deputy Governor Declares Senate Ambition for 2027 Elections
item.description: A former deputy governor of Ondo State, Lucky Orimisan Adegbenro, has officially announced his intention to run for the Senate in the 2027 general elections. The declaration signals an early entry int...

item.title: The Rise of AI in Literature: How Artificial Intelligence Is Writing and Polishing Books
item.description: The article explores the growing presence of artificial intelligence in literature, highlighting cases where AI tools are used to write, edit, or refine books. It begins with the author's anticipation...

item.title: Madlanga Commission Continues Hearings on Alleged Corruption in Justice System
item.description: The Madlanga Commission of Inquiry, tasked with investigating allegations of criminal conduct, political interference, and corruption within South Africa's criminal justice system, continues its proce...

item.title: Public Opinion Shows Strong Support for Sara Duterte Impeachment Inquiry
item.description: A recent survey by the OCTA Research group reveals that a significant majority of Filipino adults, approximately 70%, support the ongoing impeachment proceedings against Vice President Sara Duterte. T...

item.title: Senate Ethics Panel Adopts Rules for Handling Complaints
item.description: The Senate ethics panel finalized its internal rules, which will now allow the body to formally process and resolve complaints against senators. This development, reported by RG Cruz of ABS-CBN News o...

item.title: Pope-Trump Dispute Provides Propaganda Advantage to Iran
item.description: The ongoing tensions between Pope Leo XIV and former U.S. President Donald Trump have unexpectedly provided a propaganda opportunity for Iran. The controversy began when Trump posted AI-generated imag...

item.title: Pakistan Calls for Caution Amid US-Iran Peace Talks Planning
item.description: Pakistan has advised media outlets and the public to avoid speculation regarding the schedule for the second round of US-Iran negotiations. The Foreign Office spokesperson, Tahir Hussain Andarabi, str...

item.title: Concerns Grow Over NDIS Costs and Misuse as Government Plans Major Reforms
item.description: Mark Riley’s opinion piece reflects on how Australia’s National Disability Insurance Scheme (NDIS), once a visionary reform meant to support citizens with significant disabilities, has shifted into tr...

item.title: JD Vance defends halting US military aid to Ukraine as tensions rise across Europe
item.description: JD Vance, the US Vice President, has declared that cutting American support for Ukraine remains one of the Trump administration’s proudest accomplishments. Speaking at a Turning Point USA rally in Geo...
